creator: ronald@echteman.nl
text:

wrote:

> wrote:

>> <decke@freebsd.org>  wrote:
>>
>>> Could you please have a look at PR 149722 and approve the patch from
>>> your Maintainer address if you agree on the patch?
>>>
>>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/149722
>>>
>>> Thanks!
>>>
>>
>> I don't have a computer with FreeBSD at hand, so I cannot test it,
>> but it  looks good. Please commit it.
>
> Sorry but we need the approval from the Maintainer e-mail address which
> is ronald@echteman.nl. Could you please reply and approve it from that
> one?
>

Ok. Patch is good. Please commit.

Ronald.
